query:
SELECT 
  c.id as campaign_id,
  c.name as campaign_name,
  COUNT(l.id) as total_leads,
  SUM(CASE WHEN l.createdAt > DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as leads_last_hour,
  MAX(l.createdAt) as latest_lead_at
FROM outreach_campaigns c
LEFT JOIN outreach_leads l ON l.campaignId = c.id
GROUP BY c.id, c.name
ORDER BY c.id;
